title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Sahara Energy Resources Limited
body: "Application number 5131  Applicant Sahara Energy Resource Limited objected to the name used by Sahara Energy Resources Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 9 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Sahara Energy Resources Limited is changed to 12571538, Ltd. "
